ATL.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Limited flexibility for trades. Stand-pat/minor buyer. Young core developing.

BOS.note: Tatum healthy. Hard-capped at second apron. Roster frozen, minimal flexibility. Stand-pat.

BKN.note: Hard-capped at second apron. Limited flexibility. Likely stand-pat at deadline.

CHA.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Some young talent, potential for minor trades. Buyer/stand-pat.

CHI.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Limited flexibility. Likely stand-pat at deadline.

CLE.note: Above second apron. High payroll, limited trade flexibility. Harden declined option.

DET.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Young core, some flexibility for minor moves. Buyer/stand-pat.

IND.note: Haliburton healthy. Hard-capped at first apron. Young core, some trade flexibility. Buyer.

ORL.note: Projected over second apron. High payroll, limited flexibility. Stand-pat/seller for relief.

PHI.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Three max contracts. Limited flexibility. Stand-pat.

DEN.note: Above second apron. High payroll, limited flexibility. Stand-pat.

GSW.note: Hard-capped at second apron. Roster frozen, minimal flexibility. Stand-pat.

LAC.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Kawhi traded. Limited flexibility. Retooling.

MEM.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Young core, cap space for flexibility. Buyers.

NOP.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Some flexibility for trades. Buyer/stand-pat.

PHX.note: Hard-capped at second apron. High payroll, limited flexibility. Stand-pat.
